items.title: WashWizard: Founding Venture
items.desc: A compact washing machine startup funded by SSIP. Orchestrated the R&D, product development, and initial market strategy to cater to hostel and PG demographics using CFD techniques.
items.label: Entrepreneurship

items.title: ANPR + GPS Railway System
items.desc: Led the implementation of an ANPR and GPS system for Western Railways. Integrated hardware and developed backend-frontend connectivity for real-time vehicle processing.
items.label: Infrastructure Tech

items.desc: Specialized in solving complex business bottlenecks through data-driven analysis and optimized workflow strategies. Focused on scaling operational efficiency for industrial clients.

items.title: Industrial Vending Machine
